name: Urolithin A Supplementation in Middle-aged Adults With Obesity.
short_name: Urolithin A obesity vascular mitochondrial registry
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov completed 50-participant randomized urolithin A trial in middle-aged adults with obesity, with arterial function, cerebral blood flow, nitric-oxide biomarkers, and mitochondrial-function biomarkers and no posted results in the June 10, 2026 API view.
